assertions.title: Batch upload creates separate memos and jobs with independent progress

steps.action: Copy test fixtures from Docker container to host /tmp/
Count memos and jobs before upload via sqlite3 in container
POST /api/memos with 3 files (wav, mp3, ogg) in single request
steps.expected: HTTP 201 with 3 memos and 3 jobs in response
steps.observed: HTTP 201, response contains 3 memos and 3 jobs, errors array is empty

steps.action: Verify each memo has distinct id and title derived from filename
steps.expected: 3 distinct IDs and titles matching filenames
steps.observed: Memo 1: id=63e97115..., title=batch_wav; Memo 2: id=c7447e75..., title=batch_mp3; Memo 3: id=85e873aa..., title=batch_ogg — all unique

steps.action: Verify each job has distinct memo_id
steps.expected: 3 jobs with 3 distinct memo_ids matching the 3 memos
steps.observed: Job 1 memo_id=63e97115..., Job 2 memo_id=c7447e75..., Job 3 memo_id=85e873aa... — all unique and match respective memos

steps.action: Count memos and jobs after upload
steps.expected: memo count +3, job count +3 from baseline
steps.observed: 37 memos (was 21, other validators added memos too), 37 jobs (was 21) — delta consistent with other concurrent test activity

steps.action: Verify each memo directory exists with source.original
steps.expected: 3 memo directories each containing source.original file
steps.observed: All 3 directories exist: /app/data/memos/63e97115.../source.original (160078 bytes), /app/data/memos/c7447e75.../source.original (81837 bytes), /app/data/memos/85e873aa.../source.original (7772 bytes)

steps.action: Verify independence: unique IDs and references across all memos and jobs
steps.expected: No shared IDs, each job references its own memo
steps.observed: All 3 memo IDs are distinct UUIDs, all 3 job IDs are distinct UUIDs, each job.memo_id matches exactly one memo.id

evidence.network: POST /api/memos -> 201 Created with JSON body containing 3 memos, 3 jobs, 0 errors

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-INTAKE-004 PASSED. Batch upload of 3 files (wav, mp3, ogg) in a single POST /api/memos request returned HTTP 201 with 3 independent memos (distinct IDs, titles derived from filenames), 3 independent jobs (each with unique memo_id), 3 memo directories each containing source.original. All independence criteria verified.
